upasarga_meanings.meaning: eka arTa ke kahane se dUsare arTa kA boDa karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'hemnaH saMlakzyate hyagnO viSudDiH SyAmikApi vA' (raGu॰1.10) yo lakzayaterarTaH sa eva saMlakzayateH SabdopajanaH nArTopajanaH
'AScaryadarSanaH saMlakzyate manuzyalokaH' (SA॰7)
'saMlakzyate na cCiduro'pi hAraH' (raGu॰16.62) hAraSCinna iti na dfkpaTaM yAti
'vidDeva puzpacApena tatkzaRaM samalakzyata' (kaTA॰14.29) sPuwo'rTaH
'riraMsAM tasya saMlakzya' (rAja॰3.503) saMlakzya=vijYAya=anumAya=viBAvya
'gotrezu sKalita stadA Bavati ca vrIqAvilakzaSciram' (SA0 64) vrIqAvilakzo hrImUQaH vilakzo vismayAnvita ityamaraH nizpratipattirityarTa iti svAmI

'vilakzitAstataScakrurhAhAkArAMSca sarvaSaH' (BA0 Adi0 18822) vizamaM lakzitaM dfzwiryezAM te lakzyeRa vinAkftA veti nIlakaRWaH hetuSUnyA tvAsyA vilakzaRam (amaraH) atra maheSvaro BAgurimudDarati--vilakzaRaM mataM sTAnaM yad Bavennizprayojanam
'tAM dfzwvA yuktyupAlabDAM rAjA devIM vilakzitAm' (kaTA0 1732) vilakzitAM hrImUQAm vilakzo vismayAnvita ityamaraH
'pArzataSca mahAyudDe vimuKo'dyABilakzyate' (BA0 karRa0 269) aBilakzyate lakzyate dfSyate pratiBAti
'mumoca paramezvAsaH zaw SarAnaBilakzitAn' (rA0 32826) aBilakzitAn kftANkAn lakzmopetAn
'dakziRAM prezayAmAsa vAnarAnaBilakzitAn' (rA0 4411) vftAn guRamAhAtmyena nirDAritAn
'nakzatraSabdena jyotiHSAstramupalakzyate' (manu0 3162 ityatra kullUkaH) svArTamupAdAya parArTABiDAnamupalakzaRaM Bavati
'asti rnAsterupalakzaRam SataSo'pyupalakzaye' (hari0 12351) upalakzaye cakzurvizayI karomi
'etatkftyatamaM rAjYo nityamevopalakzayet' (BA0 anu0 335) upalakzayet jAnIyAt
'lokapravAdaH satye'yaM paRqitErupalakzyate' (rA0 5266) ukto'rTaH
'sa giriranya ivopalakzyate' (hari0 21844) lakzyate pratiBAti
'AdimaDyAvasAnezu BavacCabdopalakzitA' (BEkzacaryA) (yajYa0 130) BavacCabdoccAraRenANkitA
'suKAsInaM tatastaM tu viSrAntamupalakzya' (BA0 Adi0 7843) upalakzya niSAmya vilokya
'velopalakzaRArTamAdizwosmi tatra BavatA pravAsAdupAvfttena kASyapena' (SA0 4) kA veleti nakzatrAdidarSanena niScetum
'ahargaRe subrahmaRyAyAH sarvopalakzaRaM prakftivat' (kA0 SrO0 176) sarvezAmahnAM BedenABiDAnamityarTaH
'fRagrahaRaM niyogopalakzaRArTam' (pA0 2143 sUtravfttO) fRaSabdo niyamapara iti grAhayitum ityarTaH

prayoga.literature_text: vyaYjanAni ca te yAni lakzaRAni ca lakzaye
